gem1.description: High-confidence clean vehicles priced in the lowest cost quartile (≤$4,100). Maximum inventory at minimum acquisition cost.
gem1.criteria: Model confidence ≥ OOF threshold | Price ≤ $4,100 (25th pct) | Not risky cluster

gem2.description: Clean vehicles priced 10%+ below current market average (CVR < 0.90). Strong resale margin for value-focused buyers.
gem2.criteria: Model confidence ≥ 75% | CurrentValueRatio < 0.90 | Not risky cluster

gem3.description: High-confidence clean vehicles fairly priced at market rate (CVR 0.90–1.10). Reliability and quality for reputation-driven dealers.
gem3.criteria: Model confidence ≥ 85% | Value ratio ∈ [0.90, 1.10] | Not risky cluster

methodology: Out-of-Fold precision calibration (5-Fold CV, zero leakage)
